default.description: Default pre-recorded STT — diarization-enabled async transcription
default.pricingNotes: Gladia pre-recorded transcription is estimated at $0.61/hour. Free trial credits, custom plans, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Direct YouTube links are limited to 120 minutes. Current CLI uploads files instead. Enterprise plans can raise the audio-length cap to 4 hours 15 minutes.
